name: WHITE NEW YORK USA GRAPHIC SWEATSHIRT
description:
White crewneck sweatshirt with distressed New York USA graphic print.

• Crisp white fleece upper.
• Black arched NEW YORK print.
• USA subtitle graphic.
• Ribbed collar and cuffs.
• Varsity streetwear style.

Available sizes M–3XL. Prince Esquire casual streetwear.
